description: Composition Black jersey for men made of 100% polyester, engineered with Dri-Fit technology, has a round neck, short sleeves with nike brand logo printed on the right sleeve and a brand patch in rubber print on the left sleeve Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours Do not dry clean or bleach Tumble dry low Cool iron; do not iron on decorations Crafted from soft polyester and engineered with Dri-Fit technology, this jersey from nike offers exemplary dry comfort, making it a great choice to wear on a healthy run or on casual days. Team this tee with track pants or shorts and running shoes for a sporty look. Add on a hooded sweatshirt for exemplary comfort during the winter.
